prompt: {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"} vertical — {argument name="subject" default="Korean idol portrait photography"}, single subject  soft black mist filter effect, lowered contrast, gentle highlight bloom, subtle glow, soft diffusion, slightly faded blacks  minimal indoor setting near window, white curtains, clean light-toned background  young Korean female idol, natural minimal makeup, dewy realistic skin texture, subtle imperfections  outfit: {argument name="outfit" default="oversized white button-up shirt + short bottoms"}, slightly loose fit, soft and casual styling, no revealing elements  hair: long dark hair, slightly messy, natural volume, softly flowing  pose: relaxed standing or slight lean, body subtly angled, one leg slightly forward, shoulders relaxed; one hand lightly touching collar or resting near neckline, the other relaxed; gentle body curve without exaggeration  expression: soft cute smile, slightly playful eyes, direct or slightly off-camera gaze  camera: close to mid-body framing, eye-level, intimate distance, slight handheld feel  lighting: diffused natural daylight, soft shadows, gentle light wrapping around face and body  mood: cute yet subtly sensual, intimate, everyday softness, quiet romantic atmosphere  quality: ultra-realistic, fine film grain, slight softness at edges, natural imperfections, dreamy understated tone
translatedPrompt: {argument name="aspect ratio" default="9:16"} 竖屏 — {argument name="subject" default="韩系偶像肖像摄影"}，单人主体，柔和黑柔滤镜效果，降低对比度，柔和高光溢出，细腻光晕，柔光漫射，略微褪色的黑色调  极简室内窗边场景，白色窗帘，干净的浅色背景  年轻韩国女偶像，自然淡妆，水润真实的皮肤质感，细微的瑕疵  服装：{argument name="outfit" default="宽松白色衬衫 + 短裤"}，略显宽松的版型，柔和休闲的风格，无暴露元素  发型：长黑发，略显凌乱，自然蓬松，柔顺飘逸  姿势：放松站立或微微倚靠，身体轻微侧转，一条腿略微向前，双肩放松；一只手轻触衣领或停留在领口附近，另一只手自然垂放；柔和的身体曲线，不夸张  表情：温柔可爱的微笑，眼神略带俏皮，直视镜头或视线微偏  相机：半身至全身取景，平视视角，亲密距离，轻微手持感  光影：漫射自然日光，柔和阴影，光线轻柔地包裹面部和身体  氛围：可爱又不失细腻的感性，亲密感，日常的柔和，安静的浪漫气息  质量：超写实，细腻的胶片颗粒感，边缘微柔，自然瑕疵，梦幻且低调的色调

breakdown.creativeCore: 韩系偶像梦幻肖像：一份全面的提示词，用于生成具有胶片滤镜、自然光感和特定时尚细节的柔和梦幻韩系偶像肖像。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: film grain, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
